summary: Material Receipt Page Enhancements - Testing new features: Google Maps (Leaflet/OpenStreetMap) integration, Email OTP verification, Resend OTP endpoint

features_tested.notes: Page loads with stats cards (In Transit/Received counts) and tabs
Shows 'No Pending Deliveries' message when empty (data-testid='no-pending-orders')
Shows 'No Received Materials' message when empty (data-testid='no-received-orders')
Returns 404 'Request not found' for non-existent request_id - expected behavior
Returns empty list [] for site engineer with no assigned in-transit orders
Projects page loads with 13 projects visible

features_tested.feature: Documents tab in Project Detail (regression test)
features_tested.notes: Documents tab visible and working. Upload zone shows 'Drop files here or click to upload'

critical_code_review_comments: MaterialReceipt.jsx properly uses react-leaflet with OpenStreetMap (no API key needed)
LocationMap component only renders when lat/lng are provided - good defensive coding
Send OTP button (data-testid='send-otp-email-btn') present in Receipt dialog
CSRF middleware updated to allow Cloudflare cluster origins - working correctly
All data-testid attributes properly set for testability
context_for_next_testing_agent: Material Receipt page fully functional with empty states displaying correctly. No in-transit orders exist in demo data, so map component (LocationMap) cannot be tested with actual GPS coordinates. The Leaflet map only renders when receipt_gps_lat/lng are provided. Backend resend-OTP endpoint returns expected 404 for non-existent requests. Documents tab regression test passed - all 7 tabs in Project Detail working.
